data.title: Apple Supplier Foxconn Considers Buying Nissan Shares, But Only If An EV Deal Is In Place
data.description: Foxconn Technology Group, Apple Inc.'s primary iPhone manufacturer, confirmed Wednesday it would consider acquiring Renault's stake in Nissan Motor Co. as part of a broader strategy to expand its electric vehicle manufacturing business.

data.title: Chevron Announces About 20% Workforce Reduction In Cost-Saving Initiative: 'Responsible Leadership Requires Taking These Steps'
data.description: In a significant cost-saving move, oil behemoth Chevron Corp. (NYSE: CVX) has announced plans to slash its workforce by up to 20%.

data.title: After DeepSeek Shook Wall Street, China's Baidu Gears Up For AI Battle With Next-Gen Ernie 5.0 Launch In Late 2025
data.description: In the face of rising competition in the artificial intelligence (AI) market, Chinese tech giant, Baidu, is preparing to roll out its next-generation AI model later this year.

data.title: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Denies Potentially Bagging $400 Million Government Contract For Armored Vehicles: 'No One Mentioned It To Me, At Least'
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk on Thursday said that he is unaware of a potential contract for $400 million to provide armored vehicles to the government.

data.title: Taiwan Mall Explosion Kills One, Injures Several — Investigation Underway
data.description: A suspected gas explosion at the Shin Kong Mitsukoshi shopping mall in Taichung, Taiwan's Situn District killed one person and critically injured five others on Wednesday morning.
